description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and deploy. In the build stage add a runWebpack job that uses the library/node:9.11.1 Docker image, runs npm i in a before_script step, then executes npm run build, and stores the public directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that runs echo 'deploying', publishes the public directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch.
